title: Episode
description: A Software Engineering Daily podcast episode including metadata, content, and engagement data.

description.description: Full show notes and episode description.

summary.description: Short summary of the episode content.

audioUrl.description: URL of the episode audio file (MP3 or AAC).

publishedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the episode was published.

episodeUrl.description: URL of the episode page on softwareengineeringdaily.com.

imageUrl.description: URL of the episode artwork image.

organization.description: Company or organization the guest represents.

guests.description: List of guests featured in the episode.

topics.description: Technical topics covered in the episode (e.g., 'Kubernetes', 'Machine Learning').

upvotes.description: Number of upvotes the episode has received.

isPremium.description: Whether this episode requires a premium membership to access.
